content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be augmented by repurposing the intrinsic reward signals from curiosity-driven methods (ICM/RND) to prioritize which episodic memories the agent retains and retrains on, rather than using generic uncertainty-based sampling. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where the agent only retains high-curiosity, high-learning-gain memories that continuously improve its generalization over time.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
